sections.title: Talking to the Odd Old Man without any bones

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how is the sorting going?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Err...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: It's going well, especially now I have all the bones I need.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: There are still a few bits and pieces I wouldn't mind, but that's the way things go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well if I see any bones I think you might like I'll bring them over.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Cheers, we, err, that is myself and the museum staff, really appreciate it.

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Snicker.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some bones for you.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Great! Let me take a look at them.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Wonderful! I'll put this with the rest.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No problem. I'll be back if I find some more.

sections.title: Trying to hand in unclean bones

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some bones for you.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Great! Just clean them up in the pot-boiler and hand them over.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some bones for you.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Great! Let me take a look at them.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: That...that covers all the bones I was searching for!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I'm glad to have furthered the cause of the museum.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I just hope everyone will enjoy the finished displays.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Yes, I'm sure EVERYONE will get a chance to enjoy my work.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Hahahahahahahahahaha!

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Bwahahahahahahahahahahahahaha!

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: MWUHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Ahem!

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Sorry.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Well anyway, I have a few items I've put together in my spare time if you want one.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I have a ram skull helm or a snazzy bonesack like mine.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Which would you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The helm.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Good choice!

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Come and see me if you lose that one, I have plenty more!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The bonesack.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Well chosen, I knew you had taste!

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Come and see me if you lose that one, I have plenty more!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have both?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I... Well... I do have many of each. I suppose it wouldn't be a problem.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Well, as much as I'd like to toss them into the dirt and all, I think it's best if you came back later with an empty backpack.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I do think they go well together, actually.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Come and see me if you lose either one, I have plenty more!
